prospects.title: VP of Sales
prospects.email_confidence: Medium — format inferred from RocketReach partial (p******@saasalerts.com); first.last pattern common at this domain
prospects.company_description: SaaS Alerts is a first-of-its-kind cybersecurity platform purpose-built for Managed Service Providers (MSPs). It monitors, reports, and remediates threats across SaaS applications for SMB clients. The platform logs over 200 million SaaS events and covers 3,100+ SMBs and 200,000+ end-user accounts.
buying_signals: Recently launched new Respond Module with automated threat remediation — expanding product, likely scaling sales headcount
Actively scaling MSP channel — VP of Sales role is front-line growth position
Company listed on cybersecurity startups to watch lists for 2026
Hiring signal: cybersecurity talent shortage is a stated pain point in their own press releases
prospects.icp_verdict: Strong fit. B2B SaaS, 10-50 employees, clear growth phase, VP of Sales is decision maker for sales intelligence tooling.

email.subject: Prospect intel for SaaS Alerts' MSP channel growth
email.body:
Hi Patrick, SaaS Alerts' new Respond Module launch caught my attention. Scaling an MSP-focused channel while the cybersecurity talent market is this tight means your team needs to be finding and closing the right MSPs fast, not burning cycles on bad-fit prospects.

Stratledger builds deep account intelligence packages on your target MSP prospects, so your reps walk into every conversation knowing exactly what's going on at that account before the first call.

I shared a bit more about how we built this and why here: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/reinier-kobus-5434252_fractionalcfo-b2bsales-salesintelligence-activity-7442645172766670848-GnVx

Would a free sample report on one of your target MSP accounts be worth 10 minutes of your time?

Reinier Kobus / Stratledger Advisory

outreach.linkedin_connection_request: Hi Patrick, your work building the MSP channel at SaaS Alerts during a product expansion phase is impressive. Would love to connect with someone navigating that kind of growth.

prospects.title: Director of Revenue Operations and Vice President of Sales
prospects.disqualification_reason: NuCare API is an NABP-accredited pharmaceutical wholesaler supplying Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs) and finished dose products. Not a B2B SaaS company. The 'API' in the company name refers to Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient, not Application Programming Interface. Outside Stratledger ICP entirely.

prospects.title: Vice President of Sales
prospects.email_confidence: Unknown — no last name resolved, email cannot be constructed
prospects.company_description: Pro Cloud SaaS is a managed IT and cybersecurity services provider with 35+ years of combined experience. Specialises in cloud migrations, identity management, cybersecurity, business applications, and consulting for compliance-driven businesses. IT services reseller / MSP, not a SaaS product company.
buying_signals: Active digital presence, compliance-focused client base suggests structured sales process
Managed IT services is a growing market with consistent hiring

Contact also cannot be fully identified: 'Brennan' first name only, no last name found across Apollo, RocketReach, or LinkedIn search. Recommend hold pending last name confirmation.

prospects.title: VP of Sales / Sales Director
prospects.email_confidence: Medium — Vitruvi's primary email format is [first]@vitruvisoftware.com per RocketReach; ZoomInfo shows j***@vitruvisoftware.com confirming first-name format
prospects.company_description: Vitruvi Software is a GIS-enabled, end-to-end telecom construction management platform (DCM). It converts GIS designs into web and mobile construction management tools for broadband, wireless, and wireline infrastructure builds. B2B SaaS serving telecom and utility operators.
buying_signals: Active LinkedIn company page with 5,100 followers, consistent content about telecom buildout
Jesse's LinkedIn still shows Vitruvi as current employer as of March 2026
ZoomInfo also shows prior role at Sitetracker — background in construction/field ops software sales, strong domain expertise
Telecom infrastructure buildout is booming in the US (BEAD programme) — strong expansion signal
prospects.stale_risk_note: ZoomInfo text describes Jesse as 'prior to Sitetracker, Jesse served as Sales Director at Vitruvi' which may indicate he has moved to Sitetracker. However, LinkedIn still shows Vitruvi as current employer. Treat with caution: verify on LinkedIn before sending.
prospects.icp_verdict: Good fit if still at Vitruvi. B2B SaaS, field-ops/telecom niche, growth phase. Verify current role before sending email.

email.subject: Prospect intelligence for Vitruvi's telecom sales push
email.body:
Hi Jesse, Vitruvi's focus on GIS-enabled construction management for telecom buildouts is well-timed given how much broadband infrastructure spend is moving right now.

Getting in front of the right telecom operators and contractors at the right time is the hard part, especially when the market is moving fast and everyone is competing for the same accounts.

Stratledger builds deep B2B account intelligence on your target prospects, so your team walks into every conversation with a full picture of what's happening at that account before the first call.

I shared a bit more about how we built this and why here: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/reinier-kobus-5434252_fractionalcfo-b2bsales-salesintelligence-activity-7442645172766670848-GnVx

Reinier Kobus / Stratledger Advisory

outreach.linkedin_connection_request: Hi Jesse, your background selling GIS-based construction management into the telecom buildout market is a niche I don't come across often. Would love to connect.

prospects.title: Vice President of Sales
prospects.email_confidence: High — RocketReach confirms first.last@dockmaster.com format at 70-100% confidence for this domain
prospects.company_description: DockMaster Software pioneered the marina management software industry in 1983 and now offers a cloud-based SaaS platform for marina operators. The product covers reservations, billing, service management, fuel management, and retail. B2B vertical SaaS for the marine/marina industry. ~25 employees.
buying_signals: Company is actively expanding its SaaS product line with cloud-based tools
Kristen joined from Cornell-educated background, professional LinkedIn presence with 500+ connections
Small sales team (confirmed ~25 employees total) means Kristen is likely hands-on with prospecting, not just managing
Vertical SaaS in a niche market means account intelligence on the right marina groups and boat dealerships would be high-value
prospects.icp_verdict: Good fit. B2B vertical SaaS, 10-50 employees, VP of Sales is directly responsible for pipeline. Small team benefits most from outsourced account intel.

prospects.title: VP of Sales / Director of Sales
prospects.disqualification_reason: Audacy is a large US radio broadcasting and audio entertainment company (formerly Entercom), operating 227+ radio stations. Not a B2B SaaS company. Randy Dame's VP of Sales role is for selling advertising inventory on radio/streaming platforms, not SaaS products. Entirely outside Stratledger ICP.

prospects.title: Vice President of Sales
prospects.email_confidence: Medium — no public format confirmation found; constructed on first.last pattern which is common for 40-50 person SaaS companies; treat as unverified
prospects.company_description: Omnira Software (formerly Mosaic by Omnira) builds reserves management, planning, and operational software for oil and gas exploration and production (E&P) companies. ~43 employees across North America and Europe. B2B vertical SaaS for the energy/oil and gas sector.
buying_signals: LinkedIn company page updated February 2026, active presence
Company serves E&P clients who are actively investing in digital transformation and operational efficiency tools
43-person company with a VP of Sales: small team, pipeline pressure is real
Customer testimonials on website reference 70/30 split between analysis and data entry as a key efficiency win, suggesting buyers are ROI-focused
prospects.icp_verdict: Good fit. B2B vertical SaaS, ~43 employees, VP of Sales is direct decision maker. Energy sector clients are data-driven and respond well to account intelligence framing.
